message:
feat: replay session history on resume, add interactive session picker

When resuming a session, the TUI now shows the full conversation history:
user messages, communicate responses, thinking text, and collapsed tool
calls. History is converted from the snapshot's Turn data directly into
TUI messages — no synthetic SSE events needed.

The --list-sessions flag shows an interactive picker (arrow keys + enter)
that runs before the main TUI, letting users browse and select a session
to resume.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
